rules_fired.because: Fluorophores absorb photons and can undergo irreversible photobleaching — the chromophore is destroyed by oxidation or bond cleavage under illumination. For DAPI specifically, UV transilluminator exposure for as little as 30 seconds before imaging causes measurable signal loss.
rules_fired.cite: Thermo Fisher Scientific: DAPI Technical Data Sheet (D1306). Lakowicz, Principles of Fluorescence Spectroscopy, 3rd ed., Ch. 1.
